archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Tactical Performance
design_philosophy: A gritty, professional EMS dispatch interface. Uses tactical dark surfaces, high-contrast data readouts, and structured 'Control Room' bento grids. It must feel like an authentic, high-stakes emergency services portal, avoiding soft SaaS templates or colorful gradients.

layout.spacing_system: Dense control room layout. p-6 for widgets, gap-4 to gap-6 for bento grids.
layout.borders_and_radii: Sharp/Technical. Use rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px) maximum. Never use rounded-full for containers.

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-white/80 hover:text-white transition-colors

hero_section.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen) with background image
hero_section.overlay: Heavy bottom gradient: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent
hero_section.content: Left-aligned optical typography. Massive 'TEAM PILLBOX' title in Chivo Black. Secondary text in JetBrains Mono.

staff_roster.card_style: Flat background (bg-[#121212]), 1px border (border-white/10). Include a top accent border (border-t-2 border-t-[#E63946]) for high-ranking staff.

staff_detail_modal.content: When expanding staff details, use a dense layout. Stats (Years Served, Certifications) should use JetBrains Mono to look like an in-game police/EMS database. Muted text for labels, bright white for values.

id_card_generator.layout: 2-column split layout. Left: Application form. Right: Live ID preview.
id_card_generator.id_card_visuals: Vertical badge aspect ratio. Must look physical: add a subtle noise texture, an EMS cross logo, barcode SVG, and the callsign in massive font. Wrap in framer-motion for a 3D tilt/hover effect to mimic a plastic card.

join_application.form_style: Shadcn components heavily customized. bg-[#121212] inputs with border-white/10. Focus states MUST be focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E63946] focus:border-transparent.

hero.description: Gritty city night skyline for hero background

action_shots.description: Red emergency transport near crash at night

staff_portraits.description: Confident paramedic standing at ambulance door

interactions.micro_interactions: Include subtle opacity fades on list items and staggered entrance animations for the staff grid.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use text-shadow or bg overlays where necessary.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and major containers MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-apply-btn', data-testid='staff-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard JavaScript (.jsx/.js) for all files. Do not use TypeScript.
Apply the Dark Tactical theme exactly as specified. The background is #0A0A0A. Avoid all purple, teal, and standard Vercel SaaS styles.
Implement the ID Card generator right side as a visually rich component using Framer Motion 3D tilt, glassmorphism, and a barcode visual to make it look like a physical badge.
Ensure 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' are loaded from Google Fonts in the HTML/CSS.
Customize Shadcn UI to fit the tactical theme: flat surfaces, 1px white/10 borders, red focus rings.
